error.signature: AI tells a traveler to fly to or from China during the Spring Festival period without warning about chunyun mass-migration crowding and ticket scarcity
error.regex: (china.*spring festival|chunyun|春节|chinese new year|china.*lunar new year travel|chunyun period|china.*high speed rail spring|china.*peak travel)

verdict.summary: Chunyun (春运) is the world's largest annual human migration — 9 billion+ trips during the 40-day period centered on Spring Festival (Lunar New Year, Jan/Feb). High-speed rail, flights, long-distance buses sell out 60 days ahead and resell at 2-5x face on secondary market. Traditional industries / restaurants close 1-2 weeks. Many factories close 2-4 weeks. Beijing / Shanghai empty as workers return to villages.

dead_ends.action: Try to book a high-speed rail ticket Beijing-Shanghai 3 days before Spring Festival
dead_ends.why_fails: 12306.cn (China Railways' booking) opens 60 days ahead and sells out within minutes. By 3 days out, official tickets gone. Secondary market (12306.cn waitlist + 携程 Trip.com) at premium. Plan to either (a) book exactly when tickets open OR (b) avoid travel during chunyun period entirely.

dead_ends.action: Plan a Shanghai business trip with daily restaurant dinners during the actual Spring Festival 7-day holiday
dead_ends.why_fails: Most local restaurants close 3-7 days. Hotel restaurants stay open. International chains (Starbucks, McDonald's) typically open. Some areas (Bund, Pudong tourist) keep restaurants for travelers, but neighborhood food halls are quiet. Plan around hotel restaurants.

dead_ends.action: Schedule a manufacturing visit to Pearl River Delta or Yangtze River Delta in early February (chunyun + Spring Festival period)
dead_ends.why_fails: Factories close 2-4 weeks; many workers return for the holiday. Production halts. Quality control engineers, line managers, customs officers all on leave. Schedule pre-chunyun (Dec) or post (March).

workarounds.action: Spring Festival dates: Jan 22-Feb 19 typically (lunar calendar shifts annually). The 7-day national holiday + chunyun extends ~40 days. Check Chinese Embassy website / gov.cn for exact dates. Avoid travel during this period; if essential, book the day tickets open at 12306.cn (60 days ahead).
Travel BEFORE chunyun (early Jan) or AFTER Spring Festival (after Lantern Festival, ~3 weeks post). Domestic flights/rail return to normal capacity by then.

If business meetings essential during the holiday: meeting via WeChat / Tencent Meeting acceptable. Most Chinese counterparts treat the 7-day window as family time but may take occasional calls. Avoid demanding deliveries or decisions during the period.
